vulnerablePopulations: ethnic minority populations with higher severity in some cohorts
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ACR/EULAR classification supported by ANA and immunologic markers; structured nephritis workup pathways in specialist care

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to rheumatology and modern therapies; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to autoantibody panels and renal biopsy in specialist centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Hydroxychloroquine, steroids, immunosuppressants, and biologics (e.g., belimumab) as indicated; treat-to-target approaches common
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Cross-country variability and long-term steroid toxicity management
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: EULAR guideline-driven care with broad access to diagnostics and therapies in many member states
